---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
     HERO — pinned crossfade (breedlove.xyz-style).
     One full-viewport photo hero, pinned via CSS position:sticky
     for an extra viewport's worth of scroll. While pinned, the
     intro layer (name/tagline) fades out and the detail layer
     (bio/CTAs/glass stat cards) fades in, directly over the photo —
     no separate panel sliding in from below. Once the crossfade
     finishes, the hero unpins and scrolling continues normally.
═══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="hero-pin-wrap">

  <section class="hero-section">
    <!-- The photo fills the entire hero as a background layer -->
    <div class="hero-bg-zoom" id="hero-bg-zoom">
      <img src="assets/profile.jpg" alt="" aria-hidden="true"
        onerror="this.style.display='none'">
      <div class="hero-bg-overlay"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-stage">
      <!-- Intro layer — name + tagline only, visible at scroll = 0 -->
      <div class="hero-inner hero-inner-intro" id="hero-layer-intro">
        <div class="hero-text-block">
          <p class="eyebrow">Policy Strategist · Program Manager · Grantmaking</p>
          <h1>Anurita Srivastava</h1>
          <p class="hero-tagline">Turning evidence into programs that actually work.</p>
          <div class="scroll-cue" aria-hidden="true">
            <span>Scroll</span>
            <div class="scroll-cue-line"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Detail layer — bio, CTAs, glass stat cards. Crossfades in
           over the photo as the hero scrolls through its pinned range. -->
      <div class="hero-inner hero-inner-detail" id="hero-layer-detail">
        <div class="hero-text-block">
          <p class="eyebrow">Policy Strategist · Program Manager · Grantmaking</p>
          <h1>Anurita Srivastava</h1>
          <p class="hero-bio">
            I work at the intersection of policy research, program management, and strategic philanthropy — designing evidence-backed interventions and helping governments and nonprofits reallocate resources and measure impact that actually matters.
          </p>
          <div class="hero-ctas">
            <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/anurita-srivastava" class="btn-outline-custom">LinkedIn ↗</a>
            <a href="https://github.com/AnuritaS" class="btn-outline-custom">GitHub ↗</a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="hero-stats-col">
          <div class="stat-card">
            <div class="stat-number">$1M+</div>
            <div class="stat-label">Projects portfolio managed</div>
          </div>
          <div class="stat-card">
            <div class="stat-number">20%</div>
            <div class="stat-label">Increase in corporate partnerships revenue</div>
          </div>
          <div class="stat-card">
            <div class="stat-number">40+</div>
            <div class="stat-label">Team members managed</div>
          </div>
          <div class="stat-card">
            <div class="stat-number">20+</div>
            <div class="stat-label">Policy panels led</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
     EXPLORE — NAV TILES
═══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="content-section-impact">
  <div class="section-divider">Explore</div>
  <div class="tile-grid">
    <a href="work.qmd" class="nav-tile">
      <div class="tile-icon">💼</div>
      <div class="tile-name">Work Experience</div>
      <div class="tile-sub">Policy · Tech · Philanthropy</div>
    </a>
    <a href="academic.qmd" class="nav-tile">
      <div class="tile-icon">🎓</div>
      <div class="tile-name">Academic</div>
      <div class="tile-sub">Georgetown · SRM</div>
    </a>
    <a href="projects/index.qmd" class="nav-tile">
      <div class="tile-icon">📊</div>
      <div class="tile-name">Projects</div>
      <div class="tile-sub">Live tools &amp; research</div>
    </a>
    <a href="extracurricular.qmd" class="nav-tile">
      <div class="tile-icon">🎮</div>
      <div class="tile-name">Off the clock</div>
      <div class="tile-sub">Gaming &amp; volunteering</div>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
     IMPACT — galaxy constellation style (interactive)
     Container is content-section-impact (50% wider than the
     standard content-section) so the whole panel — stars, text,
     padding — renders ~1.5x larger since the SVG scales with
     its container width.
═══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="content-section-impact">
  <div class="section-divider">Impact</div>

  <div class="impact-filter-row">
    <button class="impact-filter-tab on" data-cluster="all">All impact</button>
    <button class="impact-filter-tab" data-cluster="scale">Scale &amp; reach</button>
    <button class="impact-filter-tab" data-cluster="financial">Financial &amp; efficiency</button>
    <button class="impact-filter-tab" data-cluster="fundraising">Fundraising &amp; partnerships</button>
    <button class="impact-filter-tab" data-cluster="research">Research rigor</button>
  </div>

  <div class="galaxy-impact">

    <svg class="constellation-svg" viewBox="0 0 860 380" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true">
      <!-- Ambient background micro-stars -->
      <circle cx="40" cy="25" r="1" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)"/>
      <circle cx="130" cy="15" r="0.8" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.15)"/>
      <circle cx="230" cy="40" r="1.2" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.25)"/>
      <circle cx="340" cy="18" r="0.9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/>
      <circle cx="470" cy="30" r="1" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)"/>
      <circle cx="580" cy="12" r="0.7" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.15)"/>
      <circle cx="680" cy="35" r="1.1" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.22)"/>
      <circle cx="790" cy="20" r="0.8" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/>
      <circle cx="840" cy="55" r="1" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)"/>
      <circle cx="60" cy="280" r="0.9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.15)"/>
      <circle cx="200" cy="350" r="1.1" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)"/>
      <circle cx="500" cy="360" r="0.8" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.15)"/>
      <circle cx="750" cy="320" r="1" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/>
      <circle cx="820" cy="290" r="0.7" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.15)"/>
      <circle cx="548.5" cy="14.3" r="0.72" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.12)"/>
      <circle cx="631.0" cy="255.4" r="1.21" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"/>
      <circle cx="363.6" cy="16.0" r="0.67" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/>
      <circle cx="27.6" cy="78.6" r="1.02" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.19)"/>
      <circle cx="192.4" cy="223.0" r="1.15" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.08)"/>
      <circle cx="689.9" cy="263.3" r="0.77" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.11)"/>
      <circle cx="818.6" cy="129.5" r="0.57" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"/>
      <circle cx="725.4" cy="228.4" r="1.15" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.23)"/>
      <circle cx="460.8" cy="365.1" r="0.8" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.19)"/>
      <circle cx="710.0" cy="233.9" r="1.19" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)"/>
      <circle cx="603.9" cy="22.0" r="0.68" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.14)"/>
      <circle cx="72.8" cy="91.1" r="0.58" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.14)"/>
      <circle cx="545.3" cy="140.0" r="0.8" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.12)"/>
      <circle cx="231.9" cy="351.6" r="1.02" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)"/>
      <circle cx="150.5" cy="274.8" r="0.63" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.16)"/>
      <circle cx="846.1" cy="241.8" r="0.95" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.22)"/>
      <circle cx="721.4" cy="292.1" r="0.68" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.09)"/>
      <circle cx="273.1" cy="104.1" r="0.67" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.27)"/>
      <circle cx="749.9" cy="121.4" r="1.02" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.16)"/>
      <circle cx="782.4" cy="174.8" r="0.71" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.13)"/>
      <circle cx="482.2" cy="102.2" r="0.97" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.26)"/>
      <circle cx="344.5" cy="86.1" r="1.3" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/>
      <circle cx="82.3" cy="22.4" r="0.59" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.21)"/>
      <circle cx="678.3" cy="161.2" r="0.55" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.16)"/>
      <circle cx="851.7" cy="200.8" r="1.28" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.25)"/>
      <circle cx="14.8" cy="271.7" r="1.05" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.19)"/>
      <circle cx="231.8" cy="242.2" r="0.59" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.17)"/>
      <circle cx="390.7" cy="357.9" r="1.2" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.13)"/>
      <circle cx="430.5" cy="71.1" r="1.23" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.25)"/>
      <circle cx="258.7" cy="241.4" r="0.99" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.11)"/>
      <circle cx="653.1" cy="204.6" r="1.12" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.19)"/>
      <circle cx="5.5" cy="124.9" r="0.52" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.27)"/>
      <circle cx="751.9" cy="312.7" r="0.75" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.09)"/>
      <circle cx="751.3" cy="355.4" r="0.57" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/>
      <circle cx="63.8" cy="286.4" r="1.11" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.11)"/>
      <circle cx="409.0" cy="208.4" r="0.71" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.25)"/>
      <circle cx="364.7" cy="83.4" r="0.93" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.23)"/>
      <circle cx="176.0" cy="120.3" r="1.3" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.21)"/>
      <circle cx="377.4" cy="196.5" r="0.6" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.12)"/>
      <circle cx="292.4" cy="222.7" r="0.68" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.12)"/>
      <circle cx="65.3" cy="238.5" r="0.68" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.26)"/>
      <circle cx="735.7" cy="31.2" r="0.69" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.21)"/>
      <circle cx="187.1" cy="54.0" r="1.25" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.19)"/>
      <circle cx="406.8" cy="295.3" r="1.15" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.12)"/>
      <circle cx="87.4" cy="164.5" r="0.84" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.17)"/>
      <circle cx="624.7" cy="254.1" r="1.29" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"/>
      <circle cx="347.2" cy="130.5" r="1.19" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.13)"/>
      <circle cx="166.7" cy="171.0" r="0.84" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.14)"/>
      <circle cx="217.3" cy="346.6" r="0.85" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.25)"/>
      <circle cx="472.8" cy="23.7" r="1.3" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.25)"/>
      <circle cx="828.6" cy="347.8" r="1.18" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.11)"/>
      <circle cx="417.8" cy="84.1" r="0.82" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.09)"/>
      <circle cx="327.1" cy="369.6" r="0.71" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.24)"/>
      <circle cx="391.8" cy="161.5" r="1.27" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.28)"/>
      <circle cx="477.4" cy="270.8" r="0.62" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.14)"/>
      <circle cx="828.4" cy="219.3" r="0.93" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.23)"/>
      <circle cx="53.6" cy="221.1" r="0.9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.25)"/>
      <circle cx="138.8" cy="360.5" r="0.56" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.12)"/>
      <circle cx="510.8" cy="254.8" r="0.69" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"/>
      <circle cx="761.7" cy="96.1" r="0.98" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)"/>
      <circle cx="361.3" cy="221.0" r="0.92" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.27)"/>
      <circle cx="178.6" cy="270.0" r="0.69" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.16)"/>
      <circle cx="575.9" cy="116.0" r="0.75" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.23)"/>
      <circle cx="66.7" cy="174.6" r="1.3" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.28)"/>
      <circle cx="67.3" cy="83.9" r="0.71" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.27)"/>
      <circle cx="753.7" cy="330.3" r="0.8" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.11)"/>
      <circle cx="713.7" cy="265.3" r="0.99" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.28)"/>
      <circle cx="560.9" cy="7.9" r="1.15" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.14)"/>
      <circle cx="568.9" cy="352.4" r="0.61" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"/>
      <circle cx="96.0" cy="209.7" r="0.72" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)"/>

      <!-- Faint cross-cluster connectors — always visible, give the whole
           board a constellation feel regardless of which tab is active -->
      <g stroke="rgba(180,210,255,0.06)" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="4 6">
        <line x1="210" y1="145" x2="370" y2="95"/>
        <line x1="460" y1="125" x2="610" y2="110"/>
        <line x1="155" y1="210" x2="415" y2="195"/>
        <line x1="490" y1="200" x2="645" y2="215"/>
        <line x1="155" y1="210" x2="120" y2="290" stroke-dasharray="3 5"/>
      </g>

      <!-- CLUSTER 1: Scale & reach — teal stars -->
      <g data-cluster="scale" class="impact-cluster">
        <g stroke="rgba(180,210,255,0.15)" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none">
          <line x1="120" y1="100" x2="215" y2="135"/>
          <line x1="215" y1="135" x2="160" y2="200"/>
          <line x1="120" y1="100" x2="160" y2="200"/>
          <line x1="120" y1="100" x2="65" y2="175"/>
          <line x1="65" y1="175" x2="160" y2="200"/>
        </g>

        <!-- Star: 40M+ monthly users (large anchor) -->
        <circle cx="120" cy="100" r="22" fill="rgba(30,205,180,0.08)"/>
        <circle cx="120" cy="100" r="11" fill="#1ECDB4" opacity="0.88" class="star-dot" data-stat="40M+" data-ctx="Monthly active users reached through product features shipped at Zomato and Jira"/>
        <circle cx="120" cy="100" r="17" fill="rgba(30,205,180,0.18)" class="star-pulse"/>
        <text x="120" y="84" text-anchor="middle" class="star-label">40M+</text>

        <!-- Star: 40% stakeholder engagement -->
        <circle cx="215" cy="135" r="14" fill="rgba(30,205,180,0.08)"/>
        <circle cx="215" cy="135" r="6.5" fill="#1ECDB4" opacity="0.75" class="star-dot" data-stat="40%" data-ctx="Increase in stakeholder engagement"/>
        <text x="215" y="120" text-anchor="middle" class="star-label">40%</text>

        <!-- Star: 40 team -->
        <circle cx="160" cy="200" r="17" fill="rgba(30,205,180,0.08)"/>
        <circle cx="160" cy="200" r="8.5" fill="#1ECDB4" opacity="0.82" class="star-dot" data-stat="40" data-ctx="Team members managed at peak"/>
        <text x="160" y="185" text-anchor="middle" class="star-label">40</text>

        <!-- Star: 200+ students -->
        <circle cx="65" cy="175" r="14" fill="rgba(30,205,180,0.08)"/>
        <circle cx="65" cy="175" r="6.5" fill="#1ECDB4" opacity="0.75" class="star-dot" data-stat="200+" data-ctx="Students supported through career counseling"/>
        <text x="65" y="160" text-anchor="middle" class="star-label">200+</text>

        <text x="140" y="240" text-anchor="middle" class="cluster-label" fill="rgba(30,205,180,0.45)">SCALE &amp; REACH</text>
      </g>

      <!-- CLUSTER 2: Financial — blue stars -->
      <g data-cluster="financial" class="impact-cluster">
        <g stroke="rgba(180,210,255,0.15)" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none">
          <line x1="370" y1="95" x2="460" y2="125"/>
          <line x1="460" y1="125" x2="490" y2="200"/>
          <line x1="370" y1="95" x2="415" y2="195"/>
          <line x1="415" y1="195" x2="490" y2="200"/>
        </g>

        <!-- Star: $1M+ (largest anchor) -->
        <circle cx="370" cy="95" r="26" fill="rgba(111,176,232,0.08)"/>
        <circle cx="370" cy="95" r="13" fill="#6FB0E8" opacity="0.9" class="star-dot" data-stat="$1M+" data-ctx="Program portfolio managed"/>
        <circle cx="370" cy="95" r="20" fill="rgba(111,176,232,0.16)" class="star-pulse"/>
        <text x="370" y="76" text-anchor="middle" class="star-label">$1M+</text>

        <!-- Star: 28% -->
        <circle cx="460" cy="125" r="15" fill="rgba(111,176,232,0.08)"/>
        <circle cx="460" cy="125" r="7.5" fill="#6FB0E8" opacity="0.78" class="star-dot" data-stat="28%" data-ctx="Revenue increase via financial modeling"/>
        <text x="460" y="109" text-anchor="middle" class="star-label">28%</text>

        <!-- Star: 10 hrs -->
        <circle cx="415" cy="195" r="13" fill="rgba(111,176,232,0.08)"/>
        <circle cx="415" cy="195" r="6.5" fill="#6FB0E8" opacity="0.72" class="star-dot" data-stat="10 hrs/wk" data-ctx="Manual reporting eliminated"/>
        <text x="415" y="180" text-anchor="middle" class="star-label">10h/wk</text>

        <!-- Star: 48% -->
        <circle cx="490" cy="200" r="14" fill="rgba(111,176,232,0.08)"/>
        <circle cx="490" cy="200" r="7" fill="#6FB0E8" opacity="0.75" class="star-dot" data-stat="48%" data-ctx="Faster data response speeds"/>
        <text x="490" y="184" text-anchor="middle" class="star-label">48%</text>

        <text x="430" y="232" text-anchor="middle" class="cluster-label" fill="rgba(111,176,232,0.45)">FINANCIAL &amp; EFFICIENCY</text>
      </g>

      <!-- CLUSTER 3: Fundraising — gold stars -->
      <g data-cluster="fundraising" class="impact-cluster">
        <g stroke="rgba(180,210,255,0.15)" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none">
          <line x1="610" y1="110" x2="690" y2="145"/>
          <line x1="690" y1="145" x2="645" y2="215"/>
          <line x1="610" y1="110" x2="645" y2="215"/>
        </g>

        <!-- Star: 20% (anchor) -->
        <circle cx="690" cy="145" r="20" fill="rgba(232,180,74,0.08)"/>
        <circle cx="690" cy="145" r="10" fill="#E8B44A" opacity="0.88" class="star-dot" data-stat="20%" data-ctx="Increase in philanthropic revenue"/>
        <circle cx="690" cy="145" r="16" fill="rgba(232,180,74,0.16)" class="star-pulse"/>
        <text x="690" y="127" text-anchor="middle" class="star-label">20%</text>

        <!-- Star: 25% -->
        <circle cx="610" cy="110" r="14" fill="rgba(232,180,74,0.08)"/>
        <circle cx="610" cy="110" r="7" fill="#E8B44A" opacity="0.78" class="star-dot" data-stat="25%" data-ctx="Growth in donor pipeline"/>
        <text x="610" y="94" text-anchor="middle" class="star-label">25%</text>

        <!-- Star: 5,000+ grantees -->
        <circle cx="645" cy="215" r="13" fill="rgba(232,180,74,0.08)"/>
        <circle cx="645" cy="215" r="6.5" fill="#E8B44A" opacity="0.75" class="star-dot" data-stat="5,000+" data-ctx="Grantees reached through the Feeding India partnership"/>
        <text x="645" y="200" text-anchor="middle" class="star-label">5,000+</text>

        <text x="650" y="250" text-anchor="middle" class="cluster-label" fill="rgba(232,180,74,0.45)">FUNDRAISING &amp; PARTNERSHIPS</text>
      </g>

      <!-- CLUSTER 4: Research — purple stars -->
      <g data-cluster="research" class="impact-cluster">
        <!-- Star: 38 OECD countries (anchor) -->
        <circle cx="490" cy="300" r="22" fill="rgba(160,120,240,0.08)"/>
        <circle cx="490" cy="300" r="11" fill="#A078F0" opacity="0.88" class="star-dot" data-stat="38" data-ctx="OECD countries analyzed in M.P.P. thesis on industrial livestock production and gender-based violence"/>
        <circle cx="490" cy="300" r="17" fill="rgba(160,120,240,0.16)" class="star-pulse"/>
        <text x="490" y="283" text-anchor="middle" class="star-label">38</text>

        <!-- Star: 88% detection accuracy -->
        <circle cx="620" cy="315" r="14" fill="rgba(160,120,240,0.08)"/>
        <circle cx="620" cy="315" r="7" fill="#A078F0" opacity="0.78" class="star-dot" data-stat="88%" data-ctx="Classification accuracy achieved by a convolutional neural network developed for plant disease detection"/>
        <text x="620" y="299" text-anchor="middle" class="star-label">88%</text>

        <!-- Star: Bradley Hardy collaboration -->
        <circle cx="735" cy="295" r="13" fill="rgba(160,120,240,0.08)"/>
        <circle cx="735" cy="295" r="6.5" fill="#A078F0" opacity="0.75" class="star-dot" data-stat="B. Hardy" data-ctx="Research collaboration with economist Bradley Hardy on income policy and social safety net design"/>
        <text x="735" y="279" text-anchor="middle" class="star-label">B. Hardy</text>

        <g stroke="rgba(180,210,255,0.15)" stroke-width="0.8" fill="none">
          <line x1="490" y1="300" x2="620" y2="315"/>
          <line x1="620" y1="315" x2="735" y2="295"/>
          <line x1="490" y1="300" x2="735" y2="295"/>
        </g>

        <text x="610" y="350" text-anchor="middle" class="cluster-label" fill="rgba(160,120,240,0.45)">RESEARCH RIGOR</text>
      </g>
    </svg>

    <!-- Invisible hit targets for tooltip hover (positioned over SVG stars) -->
    <div class="galaxy-stars-overlay" id="galaxy-stars-overlay"></div>

    <!-- Floating tooltip -->
    <div class="galaxy-tooltip" id="galaxy-tooltip" role="tooltip" aria-live="polite"></div>

    <p class="galaxy-hint">Tap a category to focus a cluster, or hover any star — numbers delivered, not projected.</p>
  </div>
</div>


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
     FEATURED PROJECTS
═══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!--
<div class="content-section-impact">
  <div class="section-divider">Featured projects</div>
  <div class="grid-3">

    <div class="portfolio-card">
      <div class="card-bar bar-blue"></div>
      <div class="card-body-inner">
        <div class="card-tag">Causal inference · Stata</div>
        <div class="card-title">Sampling Theory &amp; Power Analysis</div>
        <div class="card-desc">Monte Carlo simulation across 13,000 regressions. Cluster RCT design with ICC = 0.3. Individual and cluster-level power calculations with attrition adjustments.</div>
        <a href="projects/stata3.qmd" class="card-link">View project →</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="portfolio-card">
      <div class="card-bar bar-sky"></div>
      <div class="card-body-inner">
        <div class="card-tag">Geospatial · Fuzzy matching</div>
        <div class="card-title">Tanzania Ward Redistricting &amp; Causal Debiasing</div>
        <div class="card-desc">Reconciled 3,333→3,944 Tanzanian wards using ArcGIS shapefile overlap. Monte Carlo simulation proving collider bias persists at N=2,500.</div>
        <a href="projects/stata8.qmd" class="card-link">View project →</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="portfolio-card">
      <div class="card-bar bar-teal"></div>
      <div class="card-body-inner">
        <div class="card-tag">Policy analysis · Evaluation</div>
        <div class="card-title">Maternal Health Access — Rural Counties</div>
        <div class="card-desc">Designed and managed a multi-site program expanding prenatal and postpartum care for 42,000 residents across 11 counties. HHS-funded.</div>
        <a href="projects/index.qmd" class="card-link">View project →</a>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
  <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:1.5rem;">
    <a href="projects/index.qmd" class="btn-outline-custom">See all projects →</a>
  </div>
</div>
-->


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
     AWARDS STRIP
═══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="content-section-impact">
  <div class="section-divider">Recognition</div>
  <div class="trophy-shelf">
    <div class="trophy-card">
      <div class="trophy-star">★</div>
      <div class="trophy-name">Engineering Excellence Award</div>
      <div class="trophy-org">Atlassian</div>
      <div class="trophy-year">2021</div>
    </div>
    <div class="trophy-card">
      <div class="trophy-star">★</div>
      <div class="trophy-name">Learning by Giving Foundation Grant Recipient</div>
      <div class="trophy-org">Center for Public and Nonprofit Leadership, Georgetown University</div>
      <div class="trophy-year">2024</div>
    </div>
       <div class="trophy-card">
      <div class="trophy-star">★</div>
      <div class="trophy-name">Dean's Scholarship Award</div>
      <div class="trophy-org">Georgetown University</div>
      <div class="trophy-year">2025</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════
     AFFILIATIONS
═══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="affil-bar">
  <span class="affil-label">Worked at</span>
  <span class="affil-chip">Georgetown University</span>
  <span class="affil-chip">Walking Tree</span>
  <span class="affil-chip">Thelma Jones Breast Cancer Foundation</span>
  <span class="affil-chip">Atlassian Corporation</span>
  <span class="affil-chip">Apple</span>
  <span class="affil-chip">Zomato</span>
</div>
```
